server.name: toRustCalcMCP
server.description: Exact-rational arbitrary-precision calculator with 351 mathematical functions. Implements transcendental functions, special functions (Bessel, Gamma, Zeta), complex numbers, list/string operations, file I/O, matrix operations, and full system integration. Rust port of the classic calc language.

option_1_binary.name: Pre-built Binary (Recommended)
option_1_binary.description: Download and run pre-compiled binary. Fastest setup, no dependencies.
option_1_binary.installation_instructions:
1. Visit https://github.com/carlomagnoglobal/toRustCalcMCP/releases/latest
2. Download binary for your platform (macOS Intel/Apple Silicon, Linux, or Windows)
3. Make executable: chmod +x toRustCalcMCP
4. Move to /usr/local/bin or add to PATH
5. Use configuration above

option_2_cargo.name: Source Build with Cargo
option_2_cargo.description: Build from source using Rust/Cargo. Requires Rust toolchain.
option_2_cargo.installation_instructions:
1. Install Rust: curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh
2. Clone: git clone https://github.com/carlomagnoglobal/toRustCalcMCP.git
3. Build: cd toRustCalcMCP && cargo build --release
4. Update cwd in configuration above
5. Use configuration above

option_3_docker.name: Docker Container
option_3_docker.description: Run in isolated Docker container. Complete environment isolation.
option_3_docker.installation_instructions:
1. Install Docker: https://www.docker.com/products/docker-desktop
2. Pull image: docker pull ghcr.io/carlomagnoglobal/toRustCalcMCP:latest
3. Verify: docker run -i --rm ghcr.io/carlomagnoglobal/toRustCalcMCP:latest
4. Use configuration above

features: Transcendental functions (sin, cos, tan, log, exp, etc.)
Special functions (Bessel, Gamma, Zeta, Error functions)
List operations (sort, reverse, unique, flatten, zip)
String operations (substr, split, replace, trim, padding)
System integration (environment, file system, process info)

quick_test.description: Test the MCP server is working
